description_long: This is a dual-arm wall sconce featuring two conical lampshades mounted on gently curved arms that extend from an oval-shaped backplate. The lampshades are smooth and likely made of fabric or frosted glass, providing a diffused light effect. The arms and backplate appear to be constructed from metal, finished in a neutral tone that complements the shades. A decorative pull cord with a teardrop-shaped end hangs from the center, suggesting a manual switch mechanism. The overall design is symmetrical, with both lampshades positioned equidistant from the central mounting plate. The fixture is intended for wall mounting and would suit both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A symmetrical dual-arm wall sconce with two conical shades, metal arms, and a central pull cord, designed for wall mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing both conical lampshades, the oval backplate, and the central pull cord.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lampshades and the protrusion of the sconce from the wall.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backplate and the attachment points of the arms to the plate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the pull cord visible beneath the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern yet classic design, with clean lines, smooth surfaces, and a symmetrical dual-arm layout. The conical shades and minimal ornamentation give it a versatile, understated elegance.
